scope: GSC-derived only (50 snapshots, 2026-05-07 to 2026-07-08, property www.bariatriccounselingcenter.com). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual. Counts labeled 'keywords' are keyword counts, never page counts.
wins: Core local terms hold the #2-3 tier: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' and 'weight loss counseling san antonio' both at position 2.0 as of 07-08; 'weight loss counseling san antonio' improved from 25.3 (early May) to 2.0 month-over-month.
'bariatric counseling' (26 impressions, the highest-impression tracked term) improved +4.2 to position 13.0; 'weight loss counseling or therapy' improved +4.9 into the #4-10 tier at 8.2.
'bariatric counselor' climbed from 16.3 (mid-June) to 7.5, and 'bariatric counseling near me' sits at 7.6 -- the whole national 'bariatric counselor/counseling' cluster is now page 1.
The hydration blog post is the top asset: 17 clicks / 3,415 impressions at position 5.1, plus page-1 discovery terms like 'can dehydration cause weight loss' (41 impressions, pos 2.9).
Position distribution improved slightly vs the 07-06 aggregate: #4-10 tier grew 4 to 5 and 21+ shrank 13 to 12; 'weight loss therapist' jumped +25 to position 11 (1 impression -- directional only).
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 25 of 75 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 50 show none. This is a keyword count, not a page count -- many keywords share one target page, and most staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages already live on www (tracker hygiene, not lost traffic).

Visibility drift across the timeline: impressions fell from 2,447 (05-07) to 1,868 (07-08, ~-24%) and impression-weighted avg position slid from 14.9 to 23.5. Part of this is more long-tail queries entering the mix, but the direction needs watching.

Near-zero CTR: 3 clicks on 1,868 impressions in the latest snapshot; even the #2-3 local terms are drawing single-digit impressions with 0 clicks. Single-impression positions swing day to day and are directional only.
'food addiction treatment' (priority 1, BCC's strategic lane) slipped -14.7 to position 75 on 4 impressions; 'san antonio bariatric center' slipped -17.0 to 30.4 on 13 impressions.
'eating disorder therapist san antonio' cooled from 10.8 (mid-June) to 23.8, and 'weight loss therapy san antonio' slipped -11.0 to 28 (2 impressions -- directional).
priority_actions: Keyword-tracker hygiene: repoint the 2 remaining staging12 targetUrls in keywords-master.json ('what-is-a-bariatric-counselor', 'what-is-a-weight-loss-counselor') to their live www URLs so GSC page-matching works; audit the 50 no-impression keywords for other stale targets. If a staging-to-prod backlog matters, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes -- do not infer a count from keyword data.

Fix CTR from the blog engine: add CTAs and internal links from the hydration post (3,415 impressions, pos 5.1) and the sleep post (1,216 impressions, pos 10.9) into the matching service pages to convert impressions into clicks.
On-page refresh for 'food addiction treatment' (pos 75) -- this is BCC's strategic lane; strengthen the target page's content and internal links before the term is out of reach.

Defend the #2-3 local core ('bariatric counseling san antonio', 'weight loss counseling san antonio') and push the 7.5-9.3 national cluster ('bariatric counselor', 'near me', 'bariatric surgery counseling') into #1-3 with title/meta tuning and FAQ schema for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility.

Investigate the impressions slide (2,447 to 1,868 since early May): compare query mix in the 05-07 vs 07-08 snapshots to determine whether it is lost rankings on head terms or seasonal/long-tail churn.
summary: 25 of 75 tracked keywords show GSC data; the local core holds #2-3 and the national bariatric-counselor cluster reached page 1, but impressions are down ~24% since early May, clicks remain near zero (3 on the latest day), and 'food addiction treatment' slipped to position 75.
